headline: DDoS Attack
description: A Distributed Denial-of-Service (DDoS) attack overwhelms a target with traffic from multiple sources, making it unavailable to legitimate users. Types: volumetric (saturate bandwidth), protocol (exploit TCP/SYN, DNS amplification), application-layer (HTTP flood, Slowloris). Defense: CDN scrubbing (Cloudflare, Akamai), rate limiting, anycast distribution.
